description: Pinned presentation (citation-numbering family, per the R12 rule; fix is a later unit): a citation listed only in the <citations> block, with no inline [n] marker in the prose, still resolves. Provenance: live CLI session 2026-06-11, plan 2026-06-11-001. Construction: document_chunks loads 2 chunks; the pre-fetch (P-201 exact-id resolution) registers them as [1]..[2]. The single scripted completion's prose contains NO bracketed index at all, but its block cites [2]. TODAY the block is stripped, the citation resolves, and the channel footer shows the [source:page] entry -- so the user sees a sourced answer whose prose never points at the source. The future fix decides the prose<->footer linking presentation; flipping this fixture's expected block is part of that fix.

document_chunks.content: Motor maintenance: megger test windings annually.
Grease the motor bearings every three months with lithium-based NLGI 2 grease.

turns.content:
Grease the motor bearings every three months using a lithium-based NLGI 2 grease, and wipe the fittings clean before applying the grease gun.
